briefs.title: Bylaw Notice Enforcement Regulation amended — new entries added to Schedule 1
briefs.summary: BC updated its Bylaw Notice Enforcement Regulation by adding new items to Schedule 1, which lists the types of local government bylaw violations that can be handled through a ticket-based fine system instead of court. The change took effect February 4, 2026.
briefs.action_required: Check if your local municipality has added new ticketable bylaw offences that apply to your business.

key_dates.label: BC Bylaw Notice Enforcement Regulation Schedule 1 amendment takes effect
